brand_identity.name: Canopi
brand_identity.core_philosophy: Digital Earth - Fusion of organic warmth and data precision

styles.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-[1.1] text-primary
styles.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-primary mb-6
styles.caption: text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-primary/60
styles.nav: text-sm font-medium tracking-wide text-primary hover:text-primary/70 transition-colors

patterns.topographic_lines: Use SVG paths with stroke-[#274E3B] opacity-10 no-fill

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.feature: bg-[#D8C3A5] border border-[#274E3B]/10 p-8 rounded-2xl hover:border-[#274E3B]/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#274E3B]/30 px-0 py-3 text-[#274E3B] placeholder:text-[#274E3B]/40 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#274E3B] transition-colors rounded-none w-full

hero.strategy: Atmospheric entry. Use the dotted network pattern in the background. Large, confident headline. Two-column layout on desktop: Left=Copy, Right=Abstract Data Viz (CSS/SVG only).

problem.strategy: High contrast. Darker background (e.g., #274E3B text on #D8C3A5, or a card with #94A991 bg). Focus on the 'Blind Spots' in current reforestation.
problem.layout: Centered headline, 3-column grid of pain points.

solution.strategy: Time Horizon Cards. 3 Cards representing Now, Near Future, Distant Future. Use 'Mist Blue' accents here to signify 'Prediction'.
solution.layout: Horizontal scroll on mobile, Grid on desktop.

how_it_works.strategy: Process Flow. Connected steps. Use a dashed SVG line connecting 3 iconic steps.

audience.strategy: Bento Grid. 2 Main cards (Project Managers vs Investors).

why_now.strategy: Urgency. Use a data-heavy aesthetic (heatmap style gradient).
why_now.layout: Feature list or single powerful statement.

founder.strategy: Intimacy. Clean typography, signature style. No photo provided, so use a stylized quote or abstract avatar.

waitlist.strategy: Minimalist form. Single field (Email) + Submit. Clean lines.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use heavy solid backgrounds for main sections unless necessary for contrast.
Use '#D8C3A5' (Sand Clay) as the primary background color.
Use '#274E3B' (Deep Forest Green) for all primary text.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use SVG patterns (dots, lines) to add texture without images.
Font: Poppins for EVERYTHING. 500 weight for heads, 400 for body.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a single-file React landing page. Use the provided colors and typography strictly. The background should be Sand Clay (#D8C3A5). Create a visual hierarchy using font size and spacing. Use the 'lucide-react' library for icons. For the 'Abstract Data Viz' in the Hero, create a custom SVG component with moving dots or lines using CSS animations.
